response.step_by_step_log:
1. Performed visual OCR to identify song titles from on-screen text: '海物語 (Go! Go! SEA STORY)' at 00:00 and 'ルパン三世のテーマ' at 03:28.
2. Identified performers through visual recognition as Hololive VTubers.
3. Formulated search queries: '"Go! Go! SEA STORY" Japanese and English lyrics' and '"ルパン三世のテーマ" Japanese and English lyrics'.
4. Gathered lyrics and structured the data into the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: A performance video featuring Hololive VTubers singing a two-song medley. The first song is 'Go! Go! SEA STORY', and the second is 'Lupin the Third Theme'. There is a brief graphical transition between the songs.

scenes.description: The video begins with the characters performing 'Go! Go! SEA STORY', with the song title displayed on the screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Usada Pekora, Houshou Marine, Oozora Subaru
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
太陽さんさん 裸足でかけだしていこうビーチへ
トコナツ 冒険 見つけにいこう 海のワンダーランド
みんな歌えば (歌おう) イルカがジャンプ (高く)
カニとタコのダンス (ワンツー)
スペシャルな夢を描こう!
輝くマリンブルー やっと出会ったサマータイム
ミラクルマリンパワー 「せーの」で飛び込もう!
Go! Go! Let's Go! SEA STORY
海底探検 泳いで 一緒に遊びにいこうよ
笑顔が何よりの たったひとつの宝物だよ
シャチの背中に (乗って) サンゴのトンネル (抜けて)
クラゲのリズム (ワンツー)
始まる夢のステージ!
きらめくマリンスノー みんないっしょにEveryday
スペシャルサマーソング 「せーの」で始めよう!
Go! Go! Let's Go!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The sun is shining, I'm running barefoot to the beach
Let's go find a summer adventure, an ocean wonderland
If everyone sings (Let's sing!)
Dolphin jumps high (High!)
Crab and octopus dance (One, two!)
Let's paint a special dream!
Shining Marine Blue, finally met, Summer Time
Miracle Marine Power, on the count of "one, two" let's dive in!
Go! Go! Let's Go! SEA STORY
Deep sea exploration, let's swim and go play together
A smile is more precious than anything, it's the only treasure
On the orca's back (Ride it!)
Through the coral tunnel (Go through!)
Jellyfish rhythm (One, two!)
The dream stage is about to begin!
Twinkling Marine Snow, everyone together everyday
Special summer song, on the count of "one, two" let's start!
Go! Go! Let's Go!

scenes.description: The characters perform 'Lupin the Third Theme', with the title displayed on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
男には 自分の世界がある
たとえるなら
空をかける ひとすじの流れ星
孤独な笑みを 夕陽にさらして
背中で泣いている 男の美学

男には 自分の世界がある
たとえるなら
空をかける ひとすじの流れ星
孤独な笑みを 夕陽にさらして
背中で泣いている 男の美学
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
A man has his own world
If I were to compare it
A shooting star that races across the sky
The trail of a single moment
Shining brightly

The loneliness in his smile
Exposed to the evening sun
The loneliness in his smile
Exposed to the evening sun
